title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/buildah to v1.31.3

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/buildah (github.com/containers/buildah)</summary>

### [`v1.31.3`](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/releases/tag/v1.31.3)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.31.2...v1.31.3)

#### What's Changed

-   \[release-1.31] Bump to v1.31.2 and then to v1.31.3-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4969](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/pull/4969)
-   \[release-1.31] \[CI:BUILD] RPM: fix buildtags by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://togithub.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4980](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/pull/4980)
-   \[release-1.31] \[CI:BUILD] rpm: spdx compatible license field by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://togithub.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4989](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/pull/4989)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.31.2...v1.31.3

### [`v1.31.2`](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/releases/tag/v1.31.2)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.31.1...v1.31.2)

#### What's Changed

-   \[release-1.31] Bump c/common by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4931](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/pull/4931)
-   \[release-1.31] CI:BUILD] RPM: define gobuild macro for rhel/centos stream by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://togithub.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4951](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/pull/4951)
-   \[CI:BUILD] Release 1.31 packit backport by [@​lsm5](https://togithub.com/lsm5) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4963](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/pull/4963)
-   \[release-1.31] Bump to 1.31.1, bump c/common to 0.55.3, remove zstd:chunked refs by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4968](https://togithub.com/containers/buildah/pull/4968)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.31.1...v1.31.2

</details>
